economic_hypothesis: A bounded consensus assembly of behaviorally distinct frozen 0018 parent sleeves can improve stressed account target velocity over its exact lead parent without changing any underlying market signal or degrading shared-account MLL safety.
who_pays_and_why_it_may_persist: The payer hypotheses remain those of the already frozen sleeves. The new causal claim is limited to account complementarity: non-synchronous opportunity paths may use otherwise idle shared risk capacity more efficiently than any one parent while same-market conflicts and the shared contract limit remain enforced.

matched_control.definition: Exact unchanged lead parent selected deterministically from each source-parent group by frozen stressed target progress.

family_terminal_policy.green: Freeze exact survivors and preregister a separate 96-start confirmation campaign without retuning.
family_terminal_policy.weak: Preserve informative baskets without promotion and change mechanism.
family_terminal_policy.falsified: Tombstone the exact static synthesis class and do not rescue it with priority or membership neighbours.

CONTRE: The component bank and anchor were selected after observing development outcomes, and consensus component voting can inherit common directional beta. Even a green family result remains selected development evidence and requires a separately frozen confirmation campaign.
